# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Create a CloudFormation template for our complete application stack (VPC, EC2, RDS, S3, Load Balancer). Focus on core infrastructure components. We'll add CloudWatch alarms and detailed monitoring after we deploy and verify the basic setup works.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: CloudFormation template for application stack

Resources:
  MyVPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: MyVPC

  MyInternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway

  MyVPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref MyVPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref MyInternetGateway

  MySubnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref MyVPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [ 0, !GetAZs 'us-east-1' ]
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: MySubnet

  MyEC2Instance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      InstanceType: t2.micro
      ImageId: ami-0c55b159cbfafe1f0
      SubnetId: !Ref MySubnet
      KeyName: my-key-pair
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: MyEC2Instance

  MyDBInstance:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBInstance
    Properties:
      DBInstanceClass: db.t2.micro
      AllocatedStorage: '20'
      Engine: mysql
      MasterUsername: admin
      MasterUserPassword: Admin1234!
      DBInstanceIdentifier: my-db-instance
      VPCSecurityGroups:
        - !Ref MyDBSecurityGroup

  MyDBSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: My DB Security Group
      VpcId: !Ref MyVPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: '3306'
          ToPort: '3306'
          SourceSecurityGroupId: !Ref MyEC2SecurityGroup

  MyEC2SecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: My EC2 Security Group
      VpcId: !Ref MyVPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: '80'
          ToPort: '80'
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0

  MyS3Bucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: my-app-bucket

  MyLoadBalancer:
    Type: AWS::ElasticLoadBalancing::LoadBalancer
    Properties:
      Listeners:
        - LoadBalancerPort: '80'
          InstancePort: '80'
          Protocol: HTTP
      HealthCheck:
        Target: HTTP:80/
        HealthyThreshold: '2'
        UnhealthyThreshold: '2'
        Interval: '30'
        Timeout: '5'
      AvailabilityZones:
        - !Select [ 0, !GetAZs 'us-east-1' ]
      Subnets:
        - !Ref MySubnet

Outputs:
  VPCId:
    Description: The VPC Id
    Value: !Ref MyVPC

  EC2InstanceId:
    Description: The EC2 Instance Id
    Value: !Ref MyEC2Instance

  DBInstanceEndpoint:
    Description: The DB Instance endpoint
    Value: !GetAtt MyDBInstance.Endpoint.Address

  S3BucketName:
    Description: The name of the S3 bucket
    Value: !Ref MyS3Bucket

  LoadBalancerDNSName:
    Description: The DNS name of the Load Balancer
    Value: !GetAtt MyLoadBalancer.DNSName
